title: Big Globe - Tough As Nails
description: A compatibility datapack for Tough As Nails, for a much more difficult experience in Big Globe
body:
A compatibility datapack for [Tough As Nails](https://modrinth.com/mod/tough-as-nails), for a much more difficult experience in [Big Globe](https://modrinth.com/mod/big-globe)

### Hot Biomes:
- The Core
- Molten caves
- Volcano
- Ashen wastes
- Crimson forest
- Warped forest
- Nether wastes
- Inferno
- Hot dense forest
- Hot light forest
- Hot plains
- Hot wasteland
- Cold Biomes:
- Frozen Caves
- Cold dense forest
- Cold light forest
- Cold plains
- Cold wasteland
- Deep dark

### Icy Biomes:
- Glacier
- Chorus forest
- End mountain
- End plains
- Overgrown end

### Neutral Biomes:
- Generic Caves
- Lush Caves
- Temperate dense forest
- Temperate light forest
- Temperate plains
- Temperate wasteland
- Swamp Plains
- Swamp Forest
- Shallow Beach
- Beach
- River
- Ocean
- Shallow
- Deep Ocean 
- Cherry Plains
- Cherry Forest
- Dripping Caves
- The Void

### Warm Biomes:
- Warm dense forest
- Warm light forest
- Warm plains
- Warm wasteland
- Mushroom caves
- Valley of souls

### Dirty Water Biomes:
- Swamp Plains
- Swamp Forest
